title: fix: handle dataclass serialization in json_default
author: ammonwk

stage1.summary: This PR adds a dataclass handler to json_default in schema_scores.py, but the exact same fix was already shipped in commit 61bb7cb3 (from PR #486 triage). The current file on the 0.9.11 branch already contains the identical dataclass.is_dataclass() check with dataclasses.asdict() on lines 22-23, plus a comment crediting the original reporter. The PR's diff would apply as a no-op duplicate insertion. Commit 61bb7cb3 also added test coverage (test_schema_scores_json_default.py) which this PR lacks.
stage1.reject_reason: Exact duplicate of already-shipped fix in commit 61bb7cb3. The current codebase already contains this dataclass handler in json_default, including the import, the is_dataclass check, and asdict conversion. Nothing new to merge.
stage1.suggested_fix: Already fixed in commit 61bb7cb3 with test coverage. No further action needed.
